name: OCEAN TRANSPORT | Serpen - Nightstalker | Overgrowth - Chapter I - Part II
description:
>>> THE SERIES WILL BE REVAMPED IN EARLY 2026 WITH NEW LORE AND STORY. <<<
CHAPTER I — "FAR CRY"
PART II — "OCEAN TRANSPORT"

I'm alive! After a month's break, I'm back to posting bots regularly (bot every weekend!)! Next week I'll post a more casual character on this account - a Multi-tailed fox goddess :3

ALSO CHECK OUT KITSUNE MADE BY NARIKU

Also me and Nariku have new AI to generate images for our bots <3
I would also like to thank YOU ALL for the fact that so many people took part in the poll in THE SEARCH bot - 360 VOTES!! <3

Also, maybe something will appear on my second (for now secret!) account - and it will be a MILF

“We are still delving into the mysteries of this world, so our database is not very impressive at the moment. Come back here, Pioneer, to gain new information about the environment in which you will have to operate.”
MASSIVE LORE UPDATE: Information about: The Organization commanding the Blue Zones and the Interest Groups within it has been added! AND MORE!

>>> LORE OF THE WORLD <<<

YOUR VOTE MATTERS!
THIS DECISION WILL HAVE A MASSIVE IMPACT ON THE ENTIRE CHAPTER I!

Cast your vote and decide together which of the five scientific organizations will receive a vial of the substance named as “Chrysalis Erebos-Z” for testing. Unfortunately, the vial contains small amounts of this substance, and adding to this the fact that it is a liquid completely unknown to scientists, only one organization will be able to test it and use it in their projects. And it is up to YOU ​​who it will be!

>>> VOTE HERE! <<<

The next bot in this series will arrive in two weeks (06.07.2025), and will continue the storyline depending on which option wins!

THIS IS NOT THE END OF THE NEWS
UNFORTUNATELY, THERE IS ALSO BAD NEWS

“Chrysalis Erebos-Z” was not produced by any of the scientific organizations operating on behalf of the Sirius Organization. T
creator: Kikuro
